caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a studio. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. To her left, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text above a graphic. On the wall to her right is a yellow vertical stripe. The "BOSS TALK 101" logo appears on the screen, featuring the word "PODCAST" inside a small white box. The woman is smiling and looking slightly to her left, maintaining a consistent expression and posture across the sequence. The camera remains stationary, and there is no significant movement or change in the scene, with the woman remaining in the same position and the background elements staying still.
